$comment: Configuration UI for the Zelos App. See https://docs.zeloscloud.io/sdk/how-to/develop-extensions/#configuration
title: V2G
description: ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 V2G decode. Leave the capture fields empty for converter-only (use the Convert Pcap action); set an interface to capture live.

interface.title: Live capture interface(s)
interface.description: Network interface to sniff for live V2G capture (a bridged green-PHY / CCS link). Comma-separate for multiple. Requires capture privileges. Leave empty for converter-only.

replay_pcap.title: Replay pcap (testing)
replay_pcap.description: Replay a pcap/pcapng as a live stream instead of sniffing an interface (same decode path; for testing without hardware).

source_name.title: Trace source name
source_name.description: Name of the trace source the decoded V2G signals are published under.
